input: I actually feel calm and hopeful today
I am proud of myself for getting through this week
I feel happy for the first time in a while
I had a good day and I want to hold onto this feeling
I am excited but also a little nervous about my progress
I am so annoyed today, nothing is going right
I feel really sad and I do not know why
I am frustrated with myself because I keep falling behind
I feel anxious about everything today
I feel empty and disconnected from everyone
I just need to vent because my workload keeps piling up
Everything feels too much and I cannot keep up
I am tired of pretending I am okay around my friends
My parents keep pressuring me and I feel trapped
I stayed up all night studying and now I feel completely drained
I feel really lonely, nobody gets me
Can you stay with me for a bit? I feel scared
I need support because I do not know what to do next
Please help me calm down before my exam
I feel alone at work and I need someone to hear me
Please do not give me advice right now, I just need someone to listen
I got good news today, but I feel guilty for being happy
I am happy things went well, and I am scared it will all fall apart again
I am furious at my friend, but I do not want to be told to forgive them yet
Everyone says I should be grateful, but I still feel empty
I cried in the bathroom at work and I feel embarrassed admitting that
Can you stop sounding like a therapist and just talk to me like a friend?
I feel stupid for needing reassurance about the same thing again
I am trying to support a friend who is struggling, and I feel helpless
I am not exactly sad, I just feel numb and far away from everything
I finally cleaned my room, and now I feel weirdly emotional
Please do not tell me to breathe; I want to understand why I keep spiraling
